expected_reason_codes.non_runtime_notice: These codes are comparison-harness diagnostics only and must not be loaded by runtime selector code.

source_grounding.source_corpus: synthetic RelayOps incident-card corpus supplied in blind authoring package
source_grounding.grounding_note: Only the supplied card IDs and their schema-derived signatures ground this evaluation asset.

acceptance_reason: Both cards expose one matching connection-pool signal family and exact none-context alignment; multiple canonical source values inside a single signature family must not become additional votes.
diagnostic_explanation: This checks the contract’s cardinality rule: correlated source references that ground one family remain one family. Extra unobserved signal families are not support.
